name: seed corpus: every JSONL record under seed/ has bootstrap_seed:true (per O-1 final sentence; allows P-2 etc. to distinguish seed from real-world data)
command: find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed" -name "*.jsonl" | while read f; do node -e 'require("fs").readFileSync("'"$f"'","utf8").trim().split("\n").forEach(l=>{const j=JSON.parse(l);if(j.bootstrap_seed!==true)throw new Error("missing bootstrap_seed in "+process.argv[1])})' "$f" || exit 1; done; echo ok 1>&2
